prose:
**Acrolein Fukui-reactivity result** — computed with chemkit `fukui-reactivity` using DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in PySCF-style DFT backend (`program`: `dft`), gas phase (`solvent`: null), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Input geometry was the user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`; this task used that geometry for Fukui single-point charge calculations, not a newly reported geometry optimization. Cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). No `warnings` array was returned by the tool.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 4, C, with **f+ = 0.64232102**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 1, O, with **f− = 0.39388616**.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors, atom labels are 1-based as returned:

| Atom | Element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.40136419 | 0.39388616 | 0.39762517 | 0.0074780351 |
| 2 | C | 0.022255106 | 0.0059884353 | 0.01412177 | 0.01626667 |
| 3 | C | 0.43404673 | 0.091403097 | 0.26272491 | 0.34264363 |
| 4 | C | 0.64232102 | 0.087369815 | 0.36484542 | 0.5549512 |
| 5 | H | -0.1572595 | 0.085961423 | -0.03564904 | -0.24322093 |
| 6 | H | -0.2072029 | 0.1856796 | -0.010761648 | -0.39288251 |
| 7 | H | -0.062116996 | 0.084485809 | 0.011184406 | -0.14660281 |
| 8 | H | -0.073407645 | 0.065225658 | -0.004090993 | -0.1386333 |

Integrity verdict returned by chemkit: `trustworthy: true` (`status`: `ok`). Integrity check details returned verbatim:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

Reproducibility: chemkit command returned was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprq56s29m/live.json`. Plot path returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-045056_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The chemkit result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot truthfully report an exact `.out` filename.
